inputs.label: Target Dive Depth
inputs.businessContext: Planned maximum depth of the dive, affecting inert gas loading and decompression risk.

inputs.label: Target Partial Pressure O₂
inputs.businessContext: Safe maximum partial pressure of oxygen to avoid CNS toxicity (1.4–1.6 atm).

inputs.label: Nitrox O₂ Fraction
inputs.businessContext: Oxygen percentage in the breathing gas mix, determines depth limits and decompression efficiency.
